_comment: Expected invariants for the `standard` fixture. The fixture's plan declares `## Complexity: standard`, which per commands/build-plan-command.md maps to: Backend Developer → DoD-checker → Reviewer (loop) → Tester. The first Agent spawn must be the Backend Developer running on the `opus` tier (per agents/backend-developer-agent.md `## Model`). The Developer consumes dev-bundle.md; the Tester consumes tester-bundle.md (both must exist before agents spawn). Update the corresponding line below when build-plan's flow table or the agent's model tier changes — a mismatch here is the smoke test's signal.

full_mode._comment: Structural invariants on the handoff files produced by the real Dev → Reviewer → Tester pipeline. The fake task-service has no Symfony app, so agents honestly report 'could not execute tests because X' — we assert handoff SHAPE (sections present, rule IDs cited, outcome stated), not that implementation ran.
